detaileddescription.para: High quality 6 degrees of freedom tracking (position and orientation).
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: A set of possible tracking modes for the Controller system.

detaileddescription.para: Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Controller stream is active (both position and rotation).
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: A set of possible tracking modes for the Controller system.

detaileddescription.para: A structure to configure controller's tracking-modes.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing information about the current state of this controller.
A structure containing information about the current state of the controller system.
A structure containing information about the tracking-stream of this controller.

detaileddescription.para: A structure containing information about the current state of this controller.

inbodydescription.para: Smooth filtered coordinate frame identifier for this Controller.
Flag to indicate if tracking-stream is active.
Mode of the given controller stream.
Note that the controller mode can switch depending on current environmental conditions. In 6dof mode both rotation and translation are available. In 3dof mode only rotation is available.
Calibration accuracy for the current controller.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing information about the current state of the controller system.

inbodydescription.para: State objects for each connected and active controller.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize.
A pointer to MLControllerConfiguration struct which contains the tracking modes to use for this session.
A pointer to an MLHandle which will the handle to the controller tracker. If this operation fails, out_handle will be ML_INVALID_HANDLE.
Failed to create a controller tracker due to an invalid input parameter.
Controller Succesfully created a controller tracker.
Perception System has not been started.
Failed to create a controller tracker due to lack of permission.
MLHandle to the tracker created by MLControllerCreateEx().
Successfully destroyed the controller tracker.
Perception System has not been started.
Failed to destroy the controller tracker due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Return the most recent controller state.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the tracker created by MLControllerCreateEx().
Pointer to valid MLControllerSystemState object to be filled with current state information.
Failed to get the controller state due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully filled out_state with current state.
Perception System has not been started.

briefdescription.para: Return the most recent controller state.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the tracker created by MLControllerCreateEx().
Pointer to valid MLControllerSystemStateEx object to be filled with current state information.
Failed to get the controller state due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully filled out_state with current state.
Perception System has not been started.
